name: Sparkle
desc: A member of the Masked Fools. Inscrutable and unscrupulous.\nA dangerous maestro of theatrics, utterly engrossed in the art of performance. Adorned with innumerable masks, she is the hero with a thousand faces.\nWealth, status, power... None of those matters to Sparkle. The only thing that can get her attention is "amusement."

1.name: Suspension of Disbelief
1.desc: The Cipher effect granted by the Ultimate lasts for 1 extra turn. All allies with Cipher have their ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Purely Fictitious
2.desc: Every stack of the Talent's effect allows allies to additionally ignore <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the target's DEF when dealing DMG.

3.name: Pipedream
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Life Is a Gamble
4.desc: The Ultimate recovers 1 more Skill Point. The Talent additionally increases the Max Skill Points by 1.

5.name: Parallax Truth
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Narrative Polysemy
6.desc: The CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill additionally increases by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Sparkle's CRIT DMG. When Sparkle uses Skill, her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost effect will apply to all teammates with Cipher. When Sparkle uses her Ultimate, any single ally who benefits from her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost will spread that effect to teammates with Cipher.

130601.name: Monodrama
130601.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sparkle's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130601.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

130602.name: Dreamdiver
130602.desc: Increases the CRIT DMG of a single target ally by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Sparkle's CRIT DMG plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). And at the same time, Advances Forward this ally's action by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.\nWhen Sparkle uses this ability on herself, the Action Advance effect will not trigger.
130602.simple_desc: Increases an ally's <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT DMG</color> and Advances Forward their action.

130603.name: The Hero with a Thousand Faces
130603.desc: Recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Points for the team and grants all allies Cipher. For allies with Cipher, each stack of the DMG Boost effect provided by Sparkle's Talent additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turns.
130603.simple_desc: Recovers <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> for the team, and enables the DMG Boost provided by Sparkle's Talent to be additionally enhanced.

130604.name: Red Herring
130604.desc: While Sparkle is on the battlefield, additionally increases the max number of Skill Points by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. Whenever an ally consumes 1 Skill Point, all allies' DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. This effect lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and can stack up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).
130604.simple_desc: Increases the team's <color=#f29e38ff>Max Skill Points</color>. Whenever an ally consumes Skill Points, enables all allies to <color=#f29e38ff>deal more damage</color>.

130606.name: Attack
130606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130607.name: Unreliable Narrator
130607.desc: After using Technique, grants all allies Misdirect for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> seconds. Characters with Misdirect will not be detected by enemies, and entering combat in the Misdirect state recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for the team.
130607.simple_desc: After using Technique, grants all allies Misdirect. Characters with Misdirect will not be detected by enemies, and entering combat while in Misdirect recovers <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> for allies.

1.point_desc: When using Basic ATK, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
The CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill will be extended until the start of the target's next turn.

Increases all allies' ATK by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. When there are 1/2/3 Quantum-Type allies in the team, additionally increases Quantum-Type allies' ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

descs: Increases the amount of Skill Points recovered by Ultimate and allows them to be <color=#f29e38ff>temporarily stored when overflowing</color>
When an ally consumes Skill Points, <color=#f29e38ff>regenerates Energy</color> for Sparkle and <color=#f29e38ff>increases DMG taken by all enemies</color>

1.name: Suspension of Disbelief
1.desc: Increases the ATK of ally targets with "Cipher" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When the battle starts or when using Skill, increases Sparkle's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

2.name: Purely Fictitious
2.desc: Each stack of the Talent's effect additionally reduces the enemy target's DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Pipedream
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Life Is a Gamble
4.desc: The Ultimate recovers 1 more Skill Point. The Talent additionally increases the Max Skill Points by 1.

5.name: Parallax Truth
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Narrative Polysemy
6.desc: The CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill additionally increases by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Sparkle's CRIT DMG. When Sparkle uses Skill, her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost effect will apply to all teammates with "Cipher." When Sparkle uses her Ultimate, any single ally who benefits from her Skill's CRIT DMG Boost will spread that effect to teammates with "Cipher."

1130601.name: Monodrama
1130601.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sparkle's ATK to one designated enemy.
1130601.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

1130602.name: Dreamdiver
1130602.desc: Increases the CRIT DMG of a designated ally by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Sparkle's CRIT DMG plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). And at the same time, advances this ally's action by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.\nWhen Sparkle uses this ability on herself, the Action Advance effect will not trigger.
1130602.simple_desc: Increases an ally's <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT DMG</color> and advances their action.

1130603.name: The Hero with a Thousand Faces
1130603.desc: Recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies. If Skill Points overflow during recovery, the excess points will be recorded, up to a max of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> points. When an ally character's turn ends, if Skill Points are below the maximum, Sparkle consumes the recorded value to recover Skill Points until the upper limit is reached. Then, grants all allies "Cipher." For ally targets with "Cipher," each stack of Boost of DMG taken by enemies provided by Sparkle's Talent additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f2]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
1130603.simple_desc: Recovers <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> for allies and additionally increases the Vulnerability effect provided by Sparkle's Talent.

1130604.name: Red Herring
1130604.desc: While Sparkle is on the battlefield, additionally increases the max number of Skill Points by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. Whenever an ally target consumes 1 Skill Point, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Figment," with each stack increasing the DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. This effect lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and can stack up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).
1130604.simple_desc: Increases the team's <color=#f29e38ff>Max Skill Points</color>. Whenever an ally target consumes Skill Points, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Figment." Each stack of "Figment" increases the <color=#f29e38ff>DMG taken</color> by all enemies.

1130606.name: Attack
1130606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1130607.name: Unreliable Narrator
1130607.desc: After using Technique, grants all allies Misdirect for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> seconds. Characters with Misdirect will not be detected by enemies, and entering combat in the Misdirect state recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for the team and regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy for Sparkle.
1130607.simple_desc: After using Technique, grants all allies Misdirect. Characters with Misdirect will not be detected by enemies, and entering combat while in Misdirect recovers <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> for allies and regenerates Energy for Sparkle.

1.point_desc: Using Basic ATK additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. When an ally character who holds the CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill consumes Skill Points, Sparkle additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.
If an ally character consumes <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more Skill Points in a single turn, Sparkle's next use of Skill will not consume Skill Points.
Increases all allies's ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an ally character holds the CRIT DMG Boost effect provided by the Skill, All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.
